hero.title: Garden Oasis Coffee - A symphony of
hero.subtitle: Savor moments of tranquility in the heart of the city, surrounded by lush greenery and exquisitely crafted coffee.

items.name: Espresso
items.desc: Bold, original flavor from Cau Dat Arabica beans.

items.name: Latte
items.desc: A silky blend of espresso and steamed fresh milk.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.desc: A thick layer of velvety milk foam over rich espresso.

items.name: Caramel Macchiato
items.desc: Sweet caramel intertwined with milk and coffee.

items.name: Black Coffee
items.desc: Traditional phin-brewed coffee, bold Robusta flavor.

items.name: Milk Coffee
items.desc: The perfect harmony of bitter coffee and sweet condensed milk.

items.name: Bac Xiu
items.desc: More milk, less coffee — a favorite for all ages.

items.name: Egg Coffee
items.desc: Rich, silky egg cream layered over hot coffee.

items.name: Peach Orange Lemongrass Tea
items.desc: Fragrant peach tea with refreshing lemongrass and fresh orange.

items.name: Golden Lotus Tea
items.desc: Oolong tea with nutty lotus seeds and crunchy water chestnuts.

items.name: Black Milk Tea
items.desc: Robust black tea blended with creamy milk.

items.name: Chrysanthemum Tea
items.desc: A calming herbal tea to relax the mind and cool the body.

items.name: Croissant
items.desc: Flaky, thousand-layer pastry with fragrant French butter.

items.name: Tiramisu
items.desc: Coffee-soaked sponge layered with Mascarpone cream.

items.name: Cheesecake
items.desc: Rich baked cheesecake with strawberry sauce.

items.name: Peach Mousse
items.desc: A light, airy mousse with fresh peach aroma.

gallery.title: Our Space
gallery.subtitle: A quiet little corner in the heart of the city.
gallery.caption: Main hall filled with greenery

items.quote: The space here is truly relaxing. The egg coffee is rich and silky without any eggy taste — a must-try!
items.name: Minh Anh

items.quote: The peach orange lemongrass tea is incredibly refreshing, and the décor is flawless — every corner is photo-worthy.
items.name: Hoang Nam

items.quote: The bac xiu is exactly to my taste. Friendly staff and a wonderfully quiet space for getting work done.
items.name: Thu Trang
